message:
fix: use prefix-based Dolt database names to prevent cross-rig contamination (bd-u8rda)

When multiple rigs share the same Dolt server, they now get separate databases
named beads_<prefix> (e.g. beads_gt, beads_bd) instead of all sharing "beads".

- migrate_dolt.go: derive database name from issue prefix during migration
- init.go: set DoltDatabase in metadata.json based on prefix during init
- store.go: backtick-quote database name in CREATE DATABASE for safety

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
